productDisplayName: Disney Kids Girl's Pooh And Hearts White Kidswear
description: CompositionWhite round neck t-shirt made of 100% cotton with puff sleeves, fuschia pink lining around neckline, fuschia pink bow tie near collar, with Pooh and heart graphics on the front Wash care1. Machine wash in cold water with gentle cycle using mild detergent2. Wash dark colours seperately3. Do not bleach4. Do not soak or wring5. Dry inside-out6. Do not tumble dry7. Do not iron on print and studsFittingComfort FitThis dainty white Pooh and hearts tee from disney is perfect for your little princess. Made of pure cotton fabric, this tee will keep your little one cool and dry through all seasons, while the Pooh graphic and pink bow add that girly touch. This tee can be teamed with denim shorts or skirts for an enjoyable outing, while you can add on a cute pair of sandals from crocs. Add on colourful jibbitz for that complete look for your little one.
